title: Alinea Utilities (Unofficial)
description: A pack that contains Optifine equivalent mods for Fabric, utility mods such as the masa collection (Tweakaroo, Litematica, etc.), and common mods used by players of Alinea.
body:
This pack was made for the purpose of playing on the Alinea server (play.alinea.gg).

While creating this pack, I kept in mind the official modpack and its contents, as well as the many other mods that I and many others commonly find useful while playing on the server. I have built upon Optifine equivalents for Fabric, consisting of performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), as well as customization mods like [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to enable shader use and ensure compatibility with as many texture packs as possible. After that, I added some common mods that are included in the official modpack of the server, which players use frequently, such as [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice), [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap), and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei). To round out the mods and make it a proper utilities pack, I added the masa collection of mods ([Tweakaroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo), [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica), [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud), and [Item Scroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-scroller)), [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit), [Sound Controller](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller), and some small miscellaneous mods I think are useful. There is also [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) and [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes), as I have seen many players use these for online LAN worlds and some self-expression.

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs) is included. If you wish to edit the provided version to create your own, the link is available here.
